scope: FrankenTerm async runtime doctrine for asupersync migration

invariants.title: Single Runtime Boundary
invariants.invariant: Production async primitives must enter via runtime_compat or explicit asupersync boundary adapters.

invariants.title: Scope-Owned Task Lifetimes
invariants.invariant: Spawned tasks require explicit scope ownership and deterministic shutdown behavior.

invariants.title: Explicit Cx Propagation
invariants.invariant: Runtime-effectful async paths require explicit Cx threading or an approved wrapper.

invariants.title: Outcome Semantics Preservation
invariants.invariant: Success, error, cancellation, and panic pathways remain distinguishable at scope boundaries.

invariants.title: Cancellation-Safe Messaging
invariants.invariant: Cancellation-sensitive send/write paths must use reserve/commit or equivalent guarded sequencing.

invariants.title: Deterministic Shutdown Signals
invariants.invariant: CLI, robot, and watcher shutdown transitions must emit deterministic state/reason signaling.

anti_patterns.pattern: Direct tokio::* usage added in doctrine-migrated production modules
Detached spawn with no owner/cancellation narrative
Outcome::Cancelled / Outcome::Panicked collapsed into generic error without reason propagation
Cancellation-sensitive channel send/write with no reserve/commit guard
Ambient runtime handles/builders introduced outside approved bootstrap surfaces

legacy_to_target_mapping.target_pattern: scope-owned spawn via cx::spawn_with_cx or explicit scope bridge
legacy_to_target_mapping.user_visible_behavior_change: owned-task shutdown reporting prevents silent orphan work

legacy_to_target_mapping.legacy_pattern: tokio::select! race with implicit cancellation branch-loss risk
legacy_to_target_mapping.target_pattern: explicit race/select semantics with cancellation checkpoints
legacy_to_target_mapping.user_visible_behavior_change: reduced silent branch-loss with explicit cancellation diagnostics

legacy_to_target_mapping.legacy_pattern: ad-hoc tokio timeout handling with inconsistent errors
legacy_to_target_mapping.user_visible_behavior_change: timeout failures emit deterministic reason/error codes
no silent command/event loss across cancellation windows

legacy_to_target_mapping.target_pattern: scope-directed teardown with explicit lifecycle phases
legacy_to_target_mapping.user_visible_behavior_change: deterministic shutdown messaging and operator recovery hints

user_facing_guarantees.guarantee: Cancellation-sensitive send/write flows will not silently lose command/event payloads.
Shutdown transitions expose deterministic phase + reason signals for operators and robot clients.
Runtime migration paths emit stable reason/error codes with actionable remediation hints.
